items.title: How Do I Like and Comment on a SmartFeed?
items.description: Only participants can 'Like' and ,Comment' on a SmartFeed from the SmartWinnr mobile app or SmartWinnr web view.

items.title: How to add a Recording to a SmartFeed?
items.description: SmartWinnr allows users with the EDITOR role to add recordings to SmartFeeds. This enables you to share audio, video, or screen recordings directly with your…

items.title: How to create a SmartFeed?
items.description: Follow the steps below to create and publish a SmartFeed in SmartWinnr.

items.title: How to delete a SmartFeed?
items.description: You can delete a SmartFeed even after it has been sent to your teams. Once deleted, the SmartFeed will be removed from all recipients’ feeds and permanently…

items.title: How to Edit a SmartFeed
items.description: Once a SmartFeed has been published, it can be edited if any changes are required.

items.title: How to send the SmartFeed to Teams?
items.description: SmartWinnr allows you to send SmartFeeds to groups or teams, making it easy to reach a large number of users in a single step.

items.title: How to view all the SmartFeeds?
items.description: SmartWinnr allows editors to view all SmartFeeds that they have created, as well as SmartFeeds created by other editors to which they have access.

items.title: How to view SmartFeed Analytics?
items.description: SmartFeed Analytics provides insights into the number of views for each SmartFeed created by you, as well as for SmartFeeds to which you have access.

items.title: SmartFeed
items.description: Bite-sized video and article content delivered to the right audience.

items.title: What are SmartFeeds?
items.description: SmartFeeds enable you to share short, focused snippets of information with your teams.
